title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling challenges at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the limitations of AI coding agents. The conversation covers infrastructure team evolution, engineering principles from major tech companies, and what distinguishes top-tier engineers in the AI era.
